case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ZHI LIANG ZHOU et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-02-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-26-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHOU, ZHI LIANG , AN INDIVIDUAL $35,649.40 PRINCIPAL, $4,171.79 INTEREST, $379.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40,200.19, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED AUG-28-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHOU, ZHI LIANG , AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $379.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ZHOU, ZHI LIANG , AN INDIVIDUAL

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ZHOU, ZHI LIANG , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-26-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-26-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-11-2008
